chart.title: Inflation of consumer prices
chart.subtitle: Annual changes in the cost to the average consumer of acquiring a set basket of goods and services. This measure is used to track changes in living costs over time.
chart.citation: International Monetary Fund (IMF) International Financial Statistics, via World Bank (2026)
